rule.name: Suspicious Process Masquerading As SvcHost.EXE
rule.notes: Detects a suspicious process that is masquerading as the legitimate "svchost.exe" by naming its binary "svchost.exe" and executing from an uncommon location. Adversaries often disguise their malicious binaries by naming them after legitimate system processes like "svchost.exe" to evade detection.

test.name: com.q1labs.semsources.cre.tests.DeviceTypeID_Test
test.text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

parameter.selectionLabel: Select a Log Source type and click 'Add'

test.name: com.q1labs.semsources.cre.tests.AQL_Test
test.text: when the event matches (LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%\svchost.exe%' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\svchost.exe%') AND (NOT((((LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\system32\svchost.exe%' OR LOWER("Process Path") LIKE '%c:\windows\syswow64\svchost.exe%') OR (LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%c:\windows\system32\svchost.exe%' OR LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%c:\windows\syswow64\svchost.exe%')) OR Filename='svchost.exe'))) AQL filter query

newevent.name: Suspicious Process Masquerading As SvcHost.EXE
newevent.description: Detects a suspicious process that is masquerading as the legitimate "svchost.exe" by naming its binary "svchost.exe" and executing from an uncommon location. Adversaries often disguise their malicious binaries by naming them after legitimate system processes like "svchost.exe" to evade detection.
